title: SPARTA Crypto-D1 Protocol Memo v1
lane_history_note: Earlier crypto_d* lines (CODR-1 crash-candle reversion etc.) were closed under crypto_d7 and crypto_d14 closeout memos. This v1 memo OPENS a NEW daily crypto study under a fresh protocol; it does NOT continue, re-tune, or revive any prior parameter set. Prior closeouts remain authoritative for prior versions.

target_assets.label: Bitcoin
target_assets.rationale: Highest-liquidity, deepest historical record, primary trend benchmark.

target_assets.label: Ether
target_assets.rationale: Second-deepest historical record; useful cross-asset robustness check vs. BTC.

target_assets.label: Solana
target_assets.rationale: Third asset that intentionally has different vol / drawdown profile -- prevents BTC-only overfitting.

forbidden_market_types: perp_futures (different funding / liquidation / leverage problem; separate later protocol)
margin_or_borrow_facilitated_spot (out of scope at this stage)

timeframe.bar_close_convention_required: UTC close; left-closed / right-open documented in any future dataset manifest.

session_model.holiday_handling: N/A for crypto; documented but not applied.
session_model.timezone_normalization: UTC primary clock; any source in local time converted at ingest with original timezone preserved as metadata.

candidate_strategy_families.label: Daily trend following
candidate_strategy_families.summary: Long signal when trailing-window return / EMA slope / regression slope is positive for N daily bars. Exit on opposite signal or trailing stop.
candidate_strategy_families.minimum_viable_test_shape: Single rule, single window length per asset, no parameter sweep beyond the pre-registered grid; OOS unread before run.

candidate_strategy_families.label: Donchian / channel breakout
candidate_strategy_families.summary: Enter on N-day high breakout; exit on M-day low breakout or M-day trailing channel.
candidate_strategy_families.minimum_viable_test_shape: Pre-registered (N, M) windows per asset; no in-sample optimisation beyond the pre-registered grid.

candidate_strategy_families.label: Moving-average trend filter
candidate_strategy_families.summary: Trade trend-following signal only when price is above a long EMA (uptrend filter); flat otherwise.
candidate_strategy_families.minimum_viable_test_shape: Single EMA window length per asset, pre-registered; filter applied to a trend-following base.

candidate_strategy_families.label: Volatility-regime gate
candidate_strategy_families.summary: Gate trade entries by realised volatility regime (e.g., enter only when rolling-vol is below / above a threshold).
candidate_strategy_families.minimum_viable_test_shape: Single rolling-vol window + single threshold per asset, pre-registered.

candidate_strategy_families.label: Momentum continuation
candidate_strategy_families.summary: Continuation entries on a k-day return signal (skip-month optional); exit on signal flip.
candidate_strategy_families.minimum_viable_test_shape: Single k window + optional skip per asset, pre-registered.

candidate_strategy_families.label: Simple risk-on / risk-off filter
candidate_strategy_families.summary: Cross-asset regime filter (e.g., BTC trend gates ETH / SOL entries) or external risk proxy gate (DXY / equity index correlation).
candidate_strategy_families.minimum_viable_test_shape: One gating series + single threshold; no multi-input fitting.

candidate_strategy_families.label: Daily mean reversion (WATCH only, not primary)
candidate_strategy_families.summary: Counter-trend / pullback entries with a tight exit; carries higher risk of regime-dependence and is treated as WATCH-only at this stage.
candidate_strategy_families.minimum_viable_test_shape: Pre-registered single-rule reversion test; never primary; never combined with trend-following without an explicit ensemble protocol.

data_requirements.missing_day_rules: Missing daily bars MUST be flagged in the manifest; never silently forward-filled.
data_requirements.exchange_or_source_provenance: Source venue / vendor explicitly named in any future dataset manifest; row-level source_id required.
data_requirements.symbol_mapping: Per-venue symbol -> SPARTA canonical (BTC / ETH / SOL) mapping versioned alongside the dataset.
data_requirements.split_rename_delisting_handling: Crypto rarely splits; renames / forks / network-changes documented as first-class events (e.g., LUNA -> LUNC, MATIC -> POL). Future research using affected assets must declare the adjustment method.
data_requirements.fee_assumptions_required: Taker-side fee per venue, dated; pre-declared before any future test.
data_requirements.slippage_assumptions_required: Conservative (slow-day) slippage haircut on top of fees; depth-aware if order-book data is available.
data_requirements.stablecoin_quote_currency_handling: Quote currency (USDT / USDC / USD) declared explicitly per series; conversions across stablecoins require an explicit FX series with a documented method.
data_requirements.data_freeze_requirement: Every dataset must be FROZEN with sha256 checksums before any IS/OOS run; manual edits invalid unless documented + re-validated under a new dataset_version.
data_requirements.no_lookahead_requirement: Features and signals available at decision time only; IS/OOS windows sealed before any run.

fee_slippage_requirements.default_assumption: TAKER on every leg unless a maker proof is pre-registered.
fee_slippage_requirements.slippage_model_minimum: Constant-bps + 1-tick haircut OR depth-aware when L2 available.

risk_assumptions.position_sizing: Equal-weight per asset OR pre-declared fixed-fraction sizing; never adaptive at this stage.
risk_assumptions.stop_loss_policy: Pre-registered if any; never added post-hoc.
risk_assumptions.drawdown_kill: Per-asset and portfolio drawdown limits pre-declared.
risk_assumptions.tail_risk_disclosure: Each future backtest report must include worst-day / worst-week / worst-month drawdown + a single named stress scenario.

validation_phases.purpose: This bundle. Lock language, scope, costs, kill rules. No data, no run.
Author the Crypto-D1 data contract + source selection (venues / vendors). Still no data pull.
Acquire frozen historical data (separately authorized); produce + freeze a per-dataset manifest under the data contract.
Implement the first candidate strategy family deterministically; no IS run yet.
Pre-register the IS window + sealed OOS window before any run.
Walk-forward / rolling validation under the pre-registered protocol.
Sensitivity to parameter perturbations + cost stress + asset coverage check.
Paper-signal SIMULATION ONLY (no broker, no order execution) -- and ONLY if a SEPARATE future authorization grants this phase.
EXPLICITLY OUT OF SCOPE for this protocol stack. Live trading requires a SEPARATE far-future protocol + authorizations after evidence exists.

pass_watch_fail_rules.PASS: Future tests show: NO lookahead; realistic fees + slippage; enough trades to support a verdict; OOS survives the IS pattern in sign + magnitude within a pre-registered tolerance; result does NOT depend on a single asset; drawdown within pre-declared limits; rules remain simple + explainable; no rule was changed mid-study.
pass_watch_fail_rules.WATCH: IS shows positive expectancy after full costs but at least one of: OOS materially weaker than IS; one asset works, others do not; trade count too low; sensitive to small fee/slippage changes; market-regime dependent.
pass_watch_fail_rules.FAIL: No OOS edge; excessive drawdown; overfit parameters; only works in one (bubble) regime; edge disappears with realistic costs.

kill_conditions: Any stress scenario (vol spike / regime flip / venue outage proxy) eats more than N months of estimated edge.
Backtest cannot be reproduced bit-for-bit by a second offline run.
An assumption (no-fee, no-slippage, no-borrow, no-funding for spot) is found to have been silently dropped.
OOS window is peeked before sealing.
Parameter sweep extends beyond the pre-registered grid.
Edge depends on data that has been manually edited without documentation.
required_future_artifacts: Crypto-D1 Data Contract v1 (P1) -- spec only, no data pull.
Crypto-D1 Dataset Manifest v1 (P2) -- per-dataset manifest schema for this lane.
Crypto-D1 Data QA / Freeze Spec v1 (P2) -- QA harness spec for the daily-crypto data shape.
Crypto-D1 Baseline Backtest Plan v1 (P3 / P4) -- pre-registration memo for the FIRST family + IS/OOS split.
Per-strategy backtest report.json + report.md with PASS / WATCH / FAIL verdict.
Lane closeout memo if a strategy family PARKs / RETIREs.
safety_boundaries: No broker control, no exchange connection, no API keys, no .env, no credential handling.
No live trading. No paper-order execution. No order placement.
No scheduler / background daemon. No external network calls in this protocol's runtime.
No data fetch in this bundle. No backtest in this bundle. No dataset processing in this bundle.
Do not modify paper / live execution files.
Do not claim profitability. Do not claim live-readiness. Do not claim STRONG evidence from this protocol alone.
Crypto trend ideas are not profitable until tested with full costs. A good historical chart does not imply future returns. No backtest is authorized by this protocol alone.
no_profit_claim_policy: This protocol does not imply edge.
Crypto trend ideas are not profitable until tested.
A good historical chart does not imply future returns.
No paper or live trading is authorized.
No backtest is authorized by this protocol alone (P3+ requires its own separate authorization).
